purpose: A loading spinner used to indicate that an asynchronous operation is in progress. Shows user that the system is working.
whenToUse: When operation takes longer than 1 second
whenNotToUse: For instant operations (<1s) — no feedback needed
For static placeholders — use skeleton UI
For long-running tasks (>10s) — use ProgressIndicator with progress
doRules: Use when operation takes longer than 1 second
Use Small for inline contexts; Large for full-page
dontRules: Do not use for instant operations
Do not block entire UI for non-critical operations
Do not omit text when context unclear
Do not show busy state on a control that has no operation pending

layoutGuidance.placement: Inline beside control, centered in container, full-page overlay.

contentRules: Include what is loading when ambiguous

incompatible: As replacement for empty state — use IllustratedMessage

exceptions: busyIndicatorDelay prevents flash on fast operations
